case_title: DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC VS. AFRIC WHITTINGHAM ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITTINGHAM, AFRIC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT ISSUE $10,000.00 RENT, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $498.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,248.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT WHITTINGHAM, AFRIC DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

***FEE PAID**** APPLICATION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO CONFORM TO PROOF PURSUANT TO CCP SEC 473; AND [PROPOSED] ORDER THEREIN (TRANSACTION ID # 210063817) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 76234813) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WHITTINGHAM, AFRIC

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WHITTINGHAM, AFRIC DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WHITTINGHAM, AFRIC DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE ** IS $67.36 PER DAY ** (TRANSACTION ID # 210027767) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210027767), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC SERVED DEC-29-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WHITTINGHAM, AFRIC
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD / UD-120 (COVER SHEETS) (TRANSACTION ID # 210027767) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC

PROOF OF SERVICE OF VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE-UNLAWFUL DETAINER (TRANSACTION ID # 210027767) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC SERVED FEB-02-2023, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT WHITTINGHAM, AFRIC DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 77017119) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WHITTINGHAM, AFRIC

PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO CONFORM TO PROOF PURSUANT TO CCP SEC 473; AND [PROPOSED] ORDER THEREIN (TRANSACTION ID # 210063817) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 75913009) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WHITTINGHAM, AFRIC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 77017119) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO 585 CCP IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 77967381) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 210027767) AS TO DEFENDANT WHITTINGHAM, AFRIC DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210027767), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC SERVED DEC-29-2022, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITTINGHAM, AFRIC DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 695 JOHN MUIR DRIVE #504, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94132, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210027767)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WHITTINGHAM, AFRIC DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 77967381) AS TO DEFENDANT WHITTINGHAM, AFRIC
DECLARATION OF LOST OR OTHERWISE UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE (TRANSACTION ID # 77967381) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC
